summary: NyayaSetuAI bridges the gap between legal documents and administrative execution by converting unstructured court judgments into verified, actionable intelligence using AI with human oversight.
optimization_claims: Reduces manual effort and processing time for government officials
Ensures no critical directive or deadline is missed
Improves speed, accuracy, and consistency of decision-making
Promotes transparent, accountable, and efficient governance
constraints_addressed: Must handle complex, inconsistent legal PDFs
Outputs must be explainable and verifiable
Focus on decision support, not full automation
